## Feature Summary
A brief, one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Ayurvedic / Domain Context
If relevant, how this aligns with Ayurvedic principles or Dosha/Vrat concepts.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
